## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Packaging / release update
- [ ] Docs / translation
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Verified package contents if packaging changed
- [ ] Verified Fox sync flow if related
- [ ] Added screenshots if UI changed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?
